title: HR Policy & Employment Terms
description: Leave entitlements, working hours, performance ratings, notice periods, and HR escalation matrix.

articles.title: Employment Classifications, Notice Periods & Working Hours
articles.content:
Employment Classifications & Notice Periods:
• Permanent Full Time / Part Time: 6 months probation | 3 months notice period.
• Fixed-Term Contract (6-24 mos): 3 months probation | 1 month notice period.
• Graduate / Intern: N/A probation | 2 weeks notice period.
Working Hours & Hybrid Policy:
• Standard working week is 40 hours (9:00 - 17:30, Mon-Fri).
• Hybrid Working: Minimum 3 days per week in the office. Permanent remote work outside country of employment requires HR, Legal, and Tax sign-off.
Overtime: Non-exempt staff must record overtime in timesheets with prior manager approval.

articles.title: Leave Entitlements & Carry-Over Rules
articles.content:
Leave Entitlements (Requested via Workday):
• Annual Leave: 25 working days per calendar year. Carry-over max 5 days into Q1 of following year.
• Sick Leave: Up to 20 days on full pay per rolling 12 months. Self-certify up to 3 days; medical certificate required beyond.
• Primary Carer Parental Leave: 16 weeks paid + statutory entitlement.
• Secondary Carer Parental Leave: 4 weeks paid.
• Compassionate Leave: Up to 5 days paid per event.
• Study Leave: Up to 5 days paid (subject to L&D approval).
• Sabbatical: Unpaid 1-6 months (minimum 3 years service required).

articles.title: Performance Rating Scale, Grievance & Disciplinary Matrix
articles.content:
Performance Ratings (Workday Talent):
• Exceptional: Consistently exceeds expectations.
• Strong: Meets and frequently exceeds expectations.
• Solid: Meets expectations.
• Development Needed: Meets some expectations; formal development plan required.
• Unsatisfactory: Managed via Performance Improvement Plan (PIP).
Grievances & Escalation Response Times:
• Payroll discrepancy: Ask HR Service Desk (2 working days)
• Leave balance query: Workday / Ask HR (1 working day)
• Benefits enrolment: Benefits Team via HR Hub (3 working days)
• Formal Grievance: HR Advisory via Grievance Portal (3 working days to acknowledge)
• Harassment / Discrimination: Speak-Up Line or HR Advisory (24 hours to acknowledge)
